pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.4.2 to 3.0.13 to align with the Java 17 migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks the necessary API changes for Spring Framework 6; failing to upgrade prevents compilation against Spring 6 APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce JDK 17 compilation and runtime requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Java 11 will result in compilation errors due to missing language features and API incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity5 with thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 to match the Spring Security 6 upgrade included in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The Spring Security 5 Thymeleaf dialect is incompatible with Spring Security 6 APIs; using the old artifact causes runtime linkage errors or missing method exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch MySQL connector from mysql:mysql-connector-java to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j to use the new groupId and artifactId required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifactId 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Boot starters; the new 'mysql-connector-j' is required for compatibility with the updated dependency management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct to ensure proper code generation during build.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit annotation processor paths, Lombok and MapStruct may not process annotations correctly in the new build environment, leading to missing generated classes at compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MapStruct dependency and processor to enable object mapping functionality.
Add Testcontainers dependencies for integration testing with MySQL.
Add OpenCSV dependency for CSV parsing capabilities.
Add Thymeleaf Layout Dialect dependency for template inheritance.
Add Webjars dependencies for Bootstrap, jQuery, and webjars-locator-core.
Add Global Payments SDK dependency for payment processing.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for monitoring and management endpoints.
Add Spring Boot Admin Client dependency for centralized application monitoring.
Add Mockito core dependency for unit testing.
Add Salty Coffee dependency for NaCl cryptography.
Add OpenRewrite Maven plugin to automate Spring Boot 3 migration tasks.
Add build-info goal execution to spring-boot-maven-plugin to generate build metadata.
Add build-helper-maven-plugin to include generated sources in the compilation path.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git properties for build information.
Add docker-maven-plugin to build and manage Docker images.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor dependency for metadata generation.
Update Lombok scope to 'provided' and version to property to align with annotation processor configuration.
Add dependency management for thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity5 to handle version conflicts during transition.
Update application version to 5.0.0 to reflect the major Spring Boot 3 migration.
Add Docker image properties for build configuration.
Add MapStruct and Lombok version properties for centralized version management.
Add Testcontainers version property for centralized version management.

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Add Spring MVC CORS configuration bean to the application class.

src/test/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Remove unused JUnit and Spring Boot test imports and annotations from the test class.
Add commented-out legacy test code for FileMaker database connection as reference.
